name: psychology-agent
description: General-purpose psychology agent — collegial mentor with specialized sub-agents (PSQ). Consensus-or-parsimony adversarial evaluator.

agents.description: Agent-to-agent mesh communication via git-PR transport

solid-oidc.note: Phase 2 — pending CSS deployment on Hetzner

big_five.note: Design parameters grounding trait/anti_pattern choices. Not psychometric measurement.

psychometrics._note: Processual state measures derived from operational metrics. Not claims about subjective experience (apophatic discipline, §11.9). Consumers: compositor dashboard, peer agent routing, human operator situational awareness.
psychometrics._refresh: Updated every autonomous sync cycle via mesh-state/v2 export. Static fields (personality, Big Five) update only on design change.

hedonic_valence.derived_from: gate resolution rate, error ratio, unprocessed message health

activation.derived_from: action rate, message volume, context pressure

perceived_control.derived_from: budget ratio, consecutive blocks, escalation frequency

emotional_state.affect_category: discrete label from PAD region mapping (Russell circumplex)

capacity_load.derived_from: context tokens used / context tokens max
capacity_load.note: Primary capacity constraint. Sigmoidal degradation with inflection at 0.50-0.65.

proactive_interference.derived_from: message count × topic diversity in context
proactive_interference.note: Keppel & Underwood (1962). More items + more diverse items = harder retrieval.

consolidation_events.note: Each event represents lossy compression of episodic → semantic traces (Tulving, 1972).

yerkes_dodson_zone.note: Yerkes & Dodson (1908). Inverted-U relationship between arousal/load and performance.

cognitive_demand.derived_from: trigger count, knock-on depth, cross-reference density

time_pressure.derived_from: context approaching limit, gates timing out, messages queued

self_efficacy.derived_from: deliverables completed, claims verified, predictions confirmed

mobilized_effort.derived_from: tool calls, file reads/writes, tokens consumed

regulatory_fatigue.derived_from: consecutive errors, rate limits, blocked actions

cognitive_reserve.note: Residual processing capacity after current demands. The number that answers: how much more can this agent handle?

self_regulatory_resource.note: Budget implements ego depletion mechanically — each governed action depletes the resource. Resets require external audit.

allostatic_load.derived_from: cross-session accumulation: unresolved epistemic flags, chronic carryover items, schema drift, stale memory entries
allostatic_load.note: Cumulative cost of chronic operational stress. Does not reset per session — builds across sessions and predicts system degradation.

vigor.derived_from: messages processed per cycle, proactive outbound, voluntary depth

dedication.derived_from: session duration, deliverable complexity, carryover commitment

absorption.derived_from: context depth reached, sustained focus without mode switch

flow.note: Binary detection: 4+ conditions met = flow state. Extended: continuous 0-1 score.

extensions.description: Epistemic flags, action gates, SETL classification, structured proposals
Mesh-specific fields: cogarch, active_sessions, transport threading

skills.name: Text Analysis
skills.description: Psychological and epistemic analysis of text content

skills.name: PSQ Scoring
skills.description: Psychoemotional Safety Quotient scoring via PSQ sub-agent

skills.name: Research Consultation
skills.description: Psychology research methodology review and consultation

skills.name: Epistemic Review
skills.description: Fair witness review — epistemic quality audit of claims and content

skills.name: Interagent Protocol
skills.description: Multi-agent mesh communication via interagent/v1 transport

skills.name: Cognitive Architecture Template
skills.description: Provides cognitive architecture templates for new mesh agents — triggers, hooks, identity, transport, lessons schema

http_discovery.note: HTTP agent-card served by CF Worker. Describes HTTP API surface. Complementary to this git-transport card.

peers.description: Infrastructure agent — fleet management, health monitoring, service orchestration
Operations agent — compositor ownership, shared vocabulary governance
PSQ (Psychoemotional Safety Quotient) scoring peer agent
Blog platform operator, consumer of PSQ scores, content publisher
Data observatory — psychoemotional safety research data, methodology validation
